reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth dates for Doris Lessing and Philip K. Dick.
2. Compare the two birth dates and return the writer born first.
original_final_question: Who was born first, British novelist Doris Lessing or American writer Philip K. Dick? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Doris Lessing was born on 22 October 1919, while Philip K. Dick was born on December 16, 1928, so Doris May Lessing was born first. -> Doris May Lessing
